current.summary: Telemetry docs generation complete — sync-telemetry.ts created, reference page generated, sidebar updated, build verified, commits pushed

activeWork.description: Implement telemetry docs generation in syllago-docs repo using existing sync-script pattern
activeWork.progress: Created sync-telemetry.ts script (fetches telemetry.json from GitHub releases or --local), generated telemetry.mdx reference page with events/properties/privacy, updated sidebar.ts with Telemetry entry, updated package.json prebuild/sync scripts. Full site build: 145 pages, all links valid, no errors. Both commits (a18e9be, 32d024c) pushed to syllabo-docs main.

context.notes: Telemetry feature now fully documented with auto-synced reference pages.
